item.endrem.black_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Hullbreaker in an Abyssal Chasm.
item.endrem.cold_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Frostmaw in the frozen wilds.
item.endrem.corrupted_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Dead King in the Catacombs.
item.endrem.cryptic_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Stalker. Search Ancient Temples from within the Otherside.
item.endrem.cursed_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Maledictus in the Frosted Prison.
item.endrem.evil_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Gorgon in a Gorgon Temple.
item.endrem.exotic_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Leviathan in the Sunken City.
item.endrem.guardian_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Elder Guardian in an Ocean Monument.
item.endrem.lost_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Ferrous Wroughtnaut in a Wrought Chamber.
item.endrem.magical_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Archevoker at an Evoker Fort.
item.endrem.nether_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from Ignis. Burning Arena maps are found in Better Nether Fortresses.
item.endrem.old_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Ancient Remnant in the Cursed Pyramid.
item.endrem.rogue_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Cyclops in a Cyclops Cave.
item.endrem.undead_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Dread Lich in a Dread Mausoleum.
item.endrem.witch_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a player-slain Licowitch in the Candy Cavity.
item.endrem.wither_eye.description: §7§oGuaranteed from a summoned Wither. Better Nether Fortresses provide the skull hunt.
